capabilities_used.evidence: 他大量用“趋势中回踩后继续”的框架。例子包括 [2026-04-09] “$TAO Summer is loading” 配图里 TAO 日线仍站在 MA5/10/30 之上；[2024-08-27] “$btc is all good till the time it holds 60k support”；[2026-04-11] “BTC added over $7,000 in just 2 weeks.”
他默认先判断是否处于强趋势，然后顺势表达高目标。例子有 [2026-04-11] “The run to $200,000 $BTC has started”；[2026-04-11] “$ZEC at #18 now I would say top 10 coming soon.” 图 1、图 7 也都在强调高低点抬升后的延续。

他反复讲“range bound play / hold the range / scalp both directions”。如 [2024-08-31] “$BTC... doing range bound play... retailers will be chased in both long and short”；[2025-02-23] “still a range bound play”；[2026-01-27] “currently its in range bound market from $84k to $94k You can scalp the range”。
[2026-04-11] 明确写 “$BTC/weekly A simple W-Bottom on the weekly chart could send #Bitcoin back to $80k.” 图 7 也是标准 W 底/双底后的上攻示意。

他常把走势解释为主力扫流动性后再走真实方向。例子有 [2024-12-08] “whales... wanted to take the market up, but first, they...” 暗示先清洗弱手；[2024-08-31] “retailers will be chased in both long and short”；[2025-02-17] 做空 LIBRA 时说 “Never repeat same market mistake again which crypto retail does every time”。
他对瀑布行情的直觉很强。图 4 是 TAO 短时间 -17% 暴跌截图；[2026-04-10] “TAO is nuking. Any news?!”；同日又发 “guys will see stocks collapsing, crypto nuking... and decide to fullport neet”，明显是在警惕无确认抄底。

他频繁用 BTC.D 解释山寨轮动。例子有 [2025-01-29] “Dominance is near 60% Bitcoin dominance is rising, putting pressure on altcoins”；[2024-11-21] “Why are your alts not moving even though Bitcoin is making new ATH...”；[2024-11-27] “This is the range in which your Alts will start flying”。
[2025-03-25] 明确写 “After over two months of consolidation within a falling wedge pattern, #Bitcoin is now attempting a breakout!” 这是他直接点名使用的经典形态。
他经常强调破位失败和假动作。例子有 [2024-07-23] “$BTC tried to break $71k but failed”；[2025-03-07] “support level... has been broken. Now we need to see the new range support”；[2024-05-30] 说价格若不能突破关键位就保持谨慎。

虽然整体风格激进，但他会反复提示减小仓位。例子有 [2024-11-24] “Buy with proper risk management, small size bag only”；[2025-01-31] “This is simply a hype play, so invest less in this”；[2025-02-13] “play safe... invest small”。
他的执行话术经常是快进快出、分批止盈、保护本金。例子有 [2024-12-10] “Small quantity only, laverage high Manage risk accordingly”；大量推文反复写 “Do book profit” 和 “hold rest”。
他会跟踪宏观事件，但不是主要框架。例子有 [2026-03-18] “FED LEAVES RATES UNCHANGED AT 3.5-3.75%.”；也会把新闻驱动与 BTC/加密方向联动。
宏观流动性并非主轴，但他明显有“政策/流动性影响加密”的意识，例如对 FED、风险资产和 world events 的反应性发言，属于辅助确认层。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Exchange Listing And Liquidity Catalyst
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 交易所上币/流动性催化
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trade around exchange listings, launchpool announcements, liquidity-boost programs, or added market-maker support as near-term catalysts for altcoin momentum and repricing.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 围绕交易所上币、Launchpool、公示流动性增强计划、做市支持等事件做催化交易，预期短期成交量和估值重定价。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-04-11] “Binance Updates the Spot Altcoin Liquidity Boost Program!”；大量历史推文围绕 “KuCoin listing might be coming”, “Launchpool”, “Binance Futures Will Launch...” 展开交易。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Ecosystem Meme Rotation Beta
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 生态 Meme 轮动 Beta
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When a base ecosystem coin trends strongly or approaches major highs, rotate into smaller ecosystem memes expected to lag and then catch up.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当某条公链主币强势或接近新高时，切换到该生态内更小市值 meme/次级资产，博弈补涨轮动。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-03-30] “$MYRO... $sol memes exploding”；[2024-11-18] “$HUND... $sol close to its ATH so its meme will print higher”；这类“主链强 -> 生态 meme 补涨”在他内容里反复出现。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Headline Screenshot Momentum Trading
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use fast-moving screenshots of headlines, papers, announcements, or viral news as immediate narrative fuel to reassess positioning before the broader market digests the information.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用新闻标题截图、论文截图、公告截图等高传播素材，快速捕捉市场尚未完全消化的叙事驱动并重估仓位。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图 2 是量子安全 Bitcoin 论文截图，图 8 是 Binance Announcement 封面，图 3 是 Binance Research 成交量图；他的高互动内容常直接由截图驱动。

personal_quirks.quote: what is swing trading? not chasing every move, just holding long enough to catch the ones that matter
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不要追每一根 K，抓大段有效波动才是核心。

personal_quirks.quote: Trade without a strategy= Gambling.   Trade + Strategy= Preparation.  Trade + Strategy + Risk management= Intention.  Trade + Strategy + Risk management + Consistent discipline= Big Success.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 交易必须是“策略 + 风控 + 纪律”的组合，不是单点预测。

personal_quirks.quote: The most important rule in trading;  Never force a trade.  If you're insure, wait.  Trading is;  - 90% patience - 10% execution
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不确定就不做，耐心比执行更重要。

personal_quirks.quote: guys will see stocks collapsing, crypto nuking & world war 3 pending and decide to fullport neet
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 极端风险环境里最忌讳满仓冲动交易。

personal_quirks.quote: I been holding $tao for 3+ years, my biggest bag by far. Staking & chilling since, probably up a house in staking rewards.   I don’t even pay attention to the daily swings like most tourists.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 对高 conviction 仓位愿意长期持有，不被短期波动洗掉。

unique_traits: 他不是纯图表派，而是把零售传播型内容、新闻截图、上币/公告催化和经典 TA 混合在一起用。高时间框架上会对 BTC、TAO 这类标的持有很强方向性信念，但执行层又大量输出短线 scalp、range 交易和 meme 轮动。相比常规 TA 交易员，他对“交易所事件催化”和“叙事传播速度”依赖更高，内容分发本身也是其交易框架的一部分。

high_conviction_phrases: this is only a warm up
still has a lot of juice
